config.name: GPT_USE_CONFIGURATIONS
config.note: When enabled the user must provide a variable named @p gpt_configurations of type @p gpt_configurations_t.

macro.name: _gpt_isr_invoke_cb
macro.brief: Common ISR code, GPT period event.
macro.param: Pointer to the GPT driver instance.

typedef.name: hal_gpt_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a GPT driver.

typedef.name: hal_gpt_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a GPT configuration.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ gpt_lld_config_fields;

field.name: cfgsnum
field.brief: Number of configurations in the open array.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ gpt_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: gptChangeIntervalI
method.brief: Changes the interval of GPT peripheral.
method.param: New cycle time in timer ticks.

method.name: gptChangeInterval
method.brief: Changes the interval of GPT peripheral.
method.param: New cycle time in timer ticks.

method.name: gptStartContinuousI
method.brief: Starts the timer in continuous mode.

method.name: gptStartContinuous
method.brief: Starts the timer in continuous mode.

method.name: gptStartOneShotI
method.brief: Starts the timer in one-shot mode.

method.name: gptStartOneShot
method.brief: Starts the timer in one-shot mode.

method.name: gptStopTimerI
gptPolledDelay
method.brief: Starts the timer in one-shot mode and waits for completion.

method.name: gptGetIntervalX
method.brief: Returns the interval of GPT peripheral.

method.name: gptGetCounterX
method.brief: Returns the counter value of GPT peripheral.
